41. Mandibular tori → management.  
    1.  [lingual plate](https://www.google.com/search?q=lingual+plate&sca_esv=09e795cc6b8f4569&biw=1280&bih=585&sxsrf=ANbL-n5P2wHpIpjJJcnHT-eRwLfrwzzHhQ%3A1776287103993&ei=f_3faaeuPMiokdUPo83MEA&ved=2ahUKEwjIv5Lo7PCTAxXz8LsIHe0pL0kQgK4QegQIARAE&uact=5&oq=tori+mandibular+which+major+connector&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiJXRvcmkgbWFuZGlidWxhciB3aGljaCBtYWpvciBjb25uZWN0b3IyBRAhGKABMgUQIRigAUigNFD_-v_AbIHBjItMzMuMrgHm0HCBwowLjkuMjUuMy4xyAfCAYAIAA&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfC_8Dacv4dnk-Ac-fkZJF0N9wARkJuxcnV8oz84dGkl6o1aAsVtzK2-0je2HebQLGQZ74R93ERf_w2Gj3ipmU7vHvQRVBNLZifdvgZCxJZWs1CWPsBYoGji6ZALDHEEyifhgXgw3olNkIDirISSZSWp6nEp2jnQyMuoRl2xwJwlQQg&csui=3) is used for moderate tori, while large, inoperable tori require a [labial bar](https://www.google.com/search?q=labial+bar&sca_esv=09e795cc6b8f4569&biw=1280&bih=585&sxsrf=ANbL-n5P2wHpIpjJJcnHT-eRwLfrwzzHhQ%3A1776287103993&ei=f_3faaeuPMiokdUPo83MEA&ved=2ahUKEwjIv5Lo7PCTAxXz8LsIHe0pL0kQgK4QegQIARAF&uact=5&oq=tori+mandibular+which+major+connector&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiJXRvcmkgbWFuZGlidWxhciB3aGljaCBtYWpvciBjb25uZWN0b3IyBRAhGKABMgUQIRigAUigNFD_-v_AbIHBjItMzMuMrgHm0HCBwowLjkuMjUuMy4xyAfCAYAIAA&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfC_8Dacv4dnk-Ac-fkZJF0N9wARkJuxcnV8oz84dGkl6o1aAsVtzK2-0je2HebQLGQZ74R93ERf_w2Gj3ipmU7vHvQRVBNLZifdvgZCxJZWs1CWPsBYoGji6ZALDHEEyifhgXgw3olNkIDirISSZSWp6nEp2jnQyMuoRl2xwJwlQQg&csui=3).
